iterations.theme: The Journey to God's Will: From Atheism to Surrender and True Happiness
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript forms a cohesive narrative delivered by a single speaker, covering a complete thought process and personal testimony within the specified time frame (approximately 40 minutes).

The First Step: Acknowledging Our Ignorance and God's Plan

The Source of True Joy: Looking to Christ, Not Self

Saints and God's Will: Mother Teresa's Example
The 'God and' Problem: Seeking God Alone
The Bitter Fruits of Disobedience: A Cautionary Tale

The Deceptive Nature of Sin and God's Commandments
